title: PRECURSOR Governance Layers
subtitle: Human-gated by default. Auditable by design.

layers.name: Plan Governance Header
layers.description: Every plan declares its risk posture and human approval state before any work begins.

fields.name: Greenlight
fields.value: YES with date, or PENDING — requires human review

fields.name: Source Inputs
fields.value: Upstream signals that shaped this plan

layers.name: Three-Point Test Contract
layers.description: Test discipline spans plan specification, execution, and closeout verification.

fields.name: Plan: Test Requirements
fields.value: Framework, scope, existing files declared up front

fields.name: Execute: TEST MANDATE
fields.value: Write tests, run suite, record results in PROGRESS.md

fields.name: Closeout: Test Verification
fields.value: Re-run and cite evidence in CLOSEOUT.md

layers.name: Artifact Verification
layers.description: The closeout agent re-reads every produced file from disk, performs class and intent checks, and cites specific structural evidence. No gate is self-approved.

fields.name: Class Check
fields.value: Is the artifact the type it claims to be?

fields.name: Intent Check
fields.value: Does it achieve what the step spec asked for?

fields.name: Evidence
fields.value: Specific headings, schema elements, structural features cited

fields.name: Non-negotiable for GREEN
fields.value: Every artifact row must PASS both checks

layers.name: Coherence Verification
layers.description: Multi-step plans append a final coherence-verification step that audits drift across sibling steps.

fields.name: Trigger
fields.value: 2 or more sibling steps in a plan or sub-plan

fields.name: Audits
fields.value: Drift, back-propagation, artifact / intent alignment, unresolved TODOs
